headline: Wang Lixia trial, local fiscal cracks signal tightening; China auto and minerals push abroad
headline_zh: 王莉霞受审与地方财政承压释放收紧信号；中国车企及矿产布局加速出海
narrative: The corruption trial of former Inner Mongolia chair Wang Lixia and Caixin's analysis of local fiscal stress point to a dual tightening: anti-graft and austerity. Meanwhile, Nissan's deal with Chery for UK production and China's hunt for US tungsten mark an assertive outward push in autos and critical minerals, challenging Western supply chains. These moves reflect Beijing's balancing act between domestic consolidation and external expansion.
narrative_zh: 前内蒙古主席王莉霞受贿案开审以及财新关于地方财政承压的分析，预示着反腐败与财政紧缩双重收紧。与此同时，日产与奇瑞达成英国生产协议、中国在全球争夺钨矿资源，标志着中国在汽车和关键矿产领域的对外扩张步伐加快，挑战西方供应链。这些举措反映了北京在国内巩固与对外拓展之间的平衡。
